source: Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search on High Dimensional Data.pdf

concepts.finding: Comprehensive survey categorizing ANN methods into tree-based, hashing-based, graph-based, and quantization-based approaches.
concepts.implication: Systematic categorization helps practitioners select ANN approaches based on dimensionality, dataset size, index constraints, and latency requirements.
concepts.open_question: What is the current best practice for billion-scale ANN search with sub-10ms latency across different hardware configurations?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: For billion-scale datasets with sub-10ms latency, IVF-PQ will provide the best recall-storage tradeoff for GPU, while HNSW will be best for CPU.
